message:
feat(dolt): annotate databases with rig owner in gt dolt status (#2252)

Show which rig owns each database in gt dolt status, gt dolt list, and
when server is not running. Prevents accidental drops of production
databases by making ownership visible (e.g., "gt (gastown rig beads)").

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
